name: Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, granulated sugar, and salt. Mix well with a fork.
2. Stir in the egg, milk, and corn until the flour mixture is just moistened.
3. Heat 1/4-inch oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the corn mixture (about 5 at a time) into the hot oil.
5. Cook the fritters for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
6. Drain well on a paper towel-lined tray.
7. Repeat with the remaining corn mixture.
8. Dust the fritters with confectioners' sugar before serving. Warm.
Makes about 1 1/2 dozen fritters.
